metrics.total_image_weight_worst_page: N/A (Placeholders used mostly, HTML size is ~22KB)

blocker.description: 6 separate Supabase queries are running sequentially, causing TTFB to exceed 500ms.

high.description: Using select('*') on kassia_page_sections, kassia_faqs, and kassia_gallery_items fetches unnecessary data payloads.

medium.description: The Astro <Image> component calls for valid URLs do not have loading='lazy' explicitly set.

low.description: Potential delays in Save/Preview logic due to waiting on synchronous SSR renders.
